title: Age of Vikings - Skjadlborg
description: Full combat round workflow automation plus token action ring and selected-actor hotbar for Age of Vikings 13.29. Includes configurable tactical or streamlined combat phases, free GM phase navigation, automatic Movement-to-Resolution continuation, acknowledged player movement planning, ordered GM-authoritative plan persistence, unified debug logging, configurable combat tracking and melee reach, canvas intent markers, grid-checkpoint engagement stopping, readied-weapon reach and initiative automation, deterministic round progression, and Foundry VTT v13.351 compatibility.
